rawText:
```json
{
  "freshness_score": 4,
  "trust_score": 6,
  "conversion_score": 5,
  "design_age_estimate": "slightly_outdated",
  "summary": "The website presents a functional but visually dated design that could benefit from modernization to improve trust and conversion rates for local search customers.",
  "issues": [
    {
      "id": "hero_gradient",
      "severity": "major",
      "title": "Outdated Hero Gradient",
      "what_observed": "The large blue gradient background in the hero section appears dated and unprofessional.",
      "why_problem": "Gradients like this were popular in the early 2000s and now make the business look less current and trustworthy. A potential customer searching for a roof restoration service might assume the business isn't up-to-date with modern techniques.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "A clean, flat color background or a high-quality, professional photograph of a restored roof.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Replace the gradient with a solid, modern color or a professional hero image. Ensure sufficient contrast between text and background."
    },
    {
      "id": "form_length",
      "severity": "critical",
      "title": "Excessive Form Length",
      "what_observed": "The quote request form is very long, requiring multiple fields including 'Roof Age' and a detailed description.",
      "why_problem": "A long form creates friction and discourages potential customers from requesting a quote. People searching locally want quick solutions, not lengthy forms. They may abandon the site and choose a competitor with a simpler process.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "A simplified form with only essential fields: Name, Phone, Email, and a brief 'Describe your project' field. Consider progressive disclosure for additional details.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Reduce the form to the minimum required information. Implement a 'Get Started' button that leads to a phone call as the primary conversion action."
    },
    {
      "id": "mobile_form_visibility",
      "severity": "critical",
      "title": "Form Obscures Content on Mobile",
      "what_observed": "The form takes up a significant portion of the screen, pushing the main content (image and text) down and potentially requiring scrolling to see it.",
      "why_problem": "On mobile, users expect immediate access to information. Hiding content below the fold without a clear call to action reduces engagement and trust. A user might think the site is poorly designed or untrustworthy.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "A single-column layout on mobile with the form positioned below the hero image and key information. Ensure the most important content is visible without scrolling.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Implement a responsive design that prioritizes content visibility on mobile devices. Stack elements vertically and reduce form length."
    },
    {
      "id": "phone_number_repetition",
      "severity": "minor",
      "title": "Repeated Phone Number",
      "what_observed": "The phone number (07) 3132 1605 is displayed twice: in the header and as a call to action button.",
      "why_problem": "While making the phone number visible is good, repetition can feel cluttered and slightly unprofessional. It doesn't add significant value.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "A single, prominent phone number in the header or a dedicated 'Call Now' button.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Remove one instance of the phone number to reduce visual clutter."
    },
    {
      "id": "roof_image_quality",
      "severity": "major",
      "title": "Low-Quality Roof Image",
      "what_observed": "The image of the house with the roof appears slightly blurry and low resolution.",
      "why_problem": "A low-quality image conveys a lack of attention to detail and professionalism. Potential customers may question the quality of the work if the website itself appears unprofessional.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "High-resolution, professionally shot images of completed roof restoration projects.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Replace the existing image with a high-quality, visually appealing photograph of a restored roof."
    }
  ],
  "positive_observations": [
    "Clear call to action with phone number.",
    "Services are clearly stated.",
    "Use of local keyword 'Brisbane'."
  ],
  "redesign_priorities": ["1. Simplify the quote request form", "2. Modernize the hero section with a flat design", "3. Improve mobile responsiveness and content visibility"],
  "confidence": 0.85
}
```

parsedJson.summary: The website presents a functional but visually dated design that could benefit from modernization to improve trust and conversion rates for local search customers.

issues.title: Outdated Hero Gradient
issues.what_observed: The large blue gradient background in the hero section appears dated and unprofessional.
issues.why_problem: Gradients like this were popular in the early 2000s and now make the business look less current and trustworthy. A potential customer searching for a roof restoration service might assume the business isn't up-to-date with modern techniques.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A clean, flat color background or a high-quality, professional photograph of a restored roof.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the gradient with a solid, modern color or a professional hero image. Ensure sufficient contrast between text and background.

issues.title: Excessive Form Length
issues.what_observed: The quote request form is very long, requiring multiple fields including 'Roof Age' and a detailed description.
issues.why_problem: A long form creates friction and discourages potential customers from requesting a quote. People searching locally want quick solutions, not lengthy forms. They may abandon the site and choose a competitor with a simpler process.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A simplified form with only essential fields: Name, Phone, Email, and a brief 'Describe your project' field. Consider progressive disclosure for additional details.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce the form to the minimum required information. Implement a 'Get Started' button that leads to a phone call as the primary conversion action.

issues.title: Form Obscures Content on Mobile
issues.what_observed: The form takes up a significant portion of the screen, pushing the main content (image and text) down and potentially requiring scrolling to see it.
issues.why_problem: On mobile, users expect immediate access to information. Hiding content below the fold without a clear call to action reduces engagement and trust. A user might think the site is poorly designed or untrustworthy.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A single-column layout on mobile with the form positioned below the hero image and key information. Ensure the most important content is visible without scrolling.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Implement a responsive design that prioritizes content visibility on mobile devices. Stack elements vertically and reduce form length.

issues.title: Repeated Phone Number
issues.what_observed: The phone number (07) 3132 1605 is displayed twice: in the header and as a call to action button.
issues.why_problem: While making the phone number visible is good, repetition can feel cluttered and slightly unprofessional. It doesn't add significant value.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A single, prominent phone number in the header or a dedicated 'Call Now' button.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove one instance of the phone number to reduce visual clutter.

issues.title: Low-Quality Roof Image
issues.what_observed: The image of the house with the roof appears slightly blurry and low resolution.
issues.why_problem: A low-quality image conveys a lack of attention to detail and professionalism. Potential customers may question the quality of the work if the website itself appears unprofessional.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: High-resolution, professionally shot images of completed roof restoration projects.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the existing image with a high-quality, visually appealing photograph of a restored roof.

positive_observations: Clear call to action with phone number.
redesign_priorities: 2. Modernize the hero section with a flat design
3. Improve mobile responsiveness and content visibility
